task:
Write a complete Next.js 16 Server Component at app/design-1/_components/Programs.tsx that renders the IRON design's Programs (pricing) section. Output ONLY the .tsx file contents — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble. === AVAILABLE TAILWIND TOKENS === Colors: bg-iron-bg #0e0e0e, bg-iron-panel #171717, bg-iron-card #1d1d1d, border-iron-line #2a2a2a, text-iron-paper / text-iron-text #f4f0e8, text-iron-text-dim #9a958c, text-iron-text-muted #5e5b54, bg-iron-orange / text-iron-orange #ff5b1f. Fonts: font-iron-display (Archivo Black), font-iron-body (Archivo), font-iron-mono (JetBrains Mono). === AVAILABLE COMPONENT === import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'; // renders a mono-numbered label with a small orange rule. === DATA — render exactly this === const IRON_TIERS = [ { tag: 'STARTER', name: 'Foundations', blurb: 'First 8 weeks. We teach the lifts, fix what hurts, and build the habit.', price: '149', cadence: '/mo', bullets: ['2× small group sessions / wk', 'Movement screen + plan', 'Nutrition starter guide', 'Private member chat'], featured: false }, { tag: 'MOST POPULAR', name: 'Build', blurb: 'Three days a week of coached strength + conditioning. The core program.', price: '249', cadence: '/mo', bullets: ['3× coached sessions / wk', 'Custom programming', 'Monthly check-in call', 'Open gym access', 'Nutrition tracking'], featured: true }, { tag: '1-ON-1', name: 'Private', blurb: 'Just you and a coach. Best for fast results, injury work, athletes.', price: '499', cadence: '/mo', bullets: ['4× 1:1 sessions / wk', 'Fully personal program', 'Weekly video review', 'Nutrition coaching', 'Text access 7d'], featured: false }, ]; === STRUCTURE === 1. Outer section: padding 110px y / 56px x on lg (use lg:px-14 lg:py-[110px] or similar), border-b border-iron-line. 2. Header row (flex, items-end, justify-between, mb-14): - Left: then h2 'Pick the plan.
We handle the rest.' (font-iron-display, big ~text-6xl, tight tracking, leading-[0.95]). - Right: short paragraph max-w-xs text-iron-text-dim: 'Every program starts with a free 45-minute intro — no commitment, no upsell.' 3. 3-column grid (gap-5) of pricing cards: - Featured card (Build): bg-iron-orange, text near-black (#0e0e0e or text-iron-bg), border-iron-orange. - Non-featured: bg-iron-card, border-iron-line, text-iron-text. - Card contents in order: mono tag (text-[11px] tracking-[0.16em], orange or near-black depending on featured), display name (font-iron-display text-4xl-ish), blurb paragraph, price block ($ + big number + cadence, with bottom border), feature bullets
    (each with mono '+' prefix and bottom border), 'Get Started →' button at the bottom. - min-h ~480px, flex flex-col so the button sits at bottom. 4. Corporate note row (mt-8): bordered, bg-iron-panel, 'FOR TEAMS' mono orange label + body text 'Corporate wellness programs — bring NLY/Fit to your business.' + 'Get Proposal →' link aligned right. === CONSTRAINTS === - Server Component (no 'use client'). - Import only what's needed: import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'. - Semantic HTML (section, h2, h3, ul, button, a). Accessible attributes where useful. - Use Tailwind utility classes; arbitrary values [12px], [0.16em] are fine for the typography details. - DO NOT invent new tokens. Use only the ones listed above (plus standard Tailwind utilities). - Output ONLY the .tsx file. No fences, no commentary.
